allow: Bash(node -e "const si = require\(''react-icons/si''\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\); console.log\(''SiCss3:'', keys.includes\(''SiCss3''\)\); console.log\(''SiCss:'', keys.filter\(k=>k.startsWith\(''SiCss''\)\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''SiAmazon:'', keys.filter\(k=>k.startsWith\(''SiAmazon''\)\).join\('', ''\)\)")
